channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [COFORGE] Coforge clarifies board meeting timings & disclosure compliance
item.description:
Coforge Ltd provided an update clarifying details related to its board meeting previously intimated on April 23, 2026. The company informed that the board meeting commenced at 7:10 am and concluded at 7:35 am. Coforge also confirmed that all necessary disclosures regarding the outcome of the board meeting were made within the stipulated regulatory timeframe, ensuring compliance.

  • Coforge provided an update on a previous board meeting.
  • The board meeting commenced at 7:10 am and concluded at 7:35 am.
  • All required disclosures were made within the stipulated time.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Coforge Ltd | Category: Clarification

item.title: [MCLEODRUSS] Mcleod Russel: Pradip Bhar Appointed Whole-Time Director & CFO
item.description:
Mcleod Russel India Ltd's board approved the appointment of Mr. Pradip Bhar as an Additional Director and Whole-Time Director & CFO for 3 years, effective April 27, 2026, subject to shareholder approval. The board also approved the execution of three MoUs for the proposed disposal of assets of certain Tea Estates for part-payment of debt in terms of Sanction letter of National Asset Reconstruction Company Limited acting through India Debt Resolution Company Limited. The Tea Estates include Nya Gogra, Rupajuli, and Boroi, all located in Assam, subject to due diligence and necessary approvals.

  • Pradip Bhar appointed Whole-Time Director & CFO, effective April 27, 2026, for a 3-year term.
  • Bhar's appointment is subject to shareholder approval and other necessary approvals.
  • Mcleod Russel approved MoUs for disposal of assets of Nya Gogra, Rupajuli, and Boroi Tea Estates.
  • The asset disposals are for part-payment of debt under a sanction letter from National Asset Reconstruction Company Limited.
  • Disposals are subject to due diligence and necessary approvals.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MCLEOD RUSSEL INDIA LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [CENTRALBK] Central Bank of India Board to consider Q4 results, dividend, capital raise
item.description:
Central Bank of India announced that its Board of Directors will meet on April 30, 2026. The primary agenda includes considering and approving the financial results for Q4 FY 2026-27. Additionally, the board will discuss a proposal for recommending a dividend for FY 2025-26, if applicable. A key item on the agenda is the consideration of a capital raising plan for the bank for FY 2026-27. This plan may involve various modes such as a Follow-on Public Offer (FPO), Rights Issue, Qualified Institutional Placement (QIP), Preferential Issue, or a combination thereof. The bank also intends to explore raising capital through BASE III Compliant AT1/Tier II Bonds or other permitted securities, subject to necessary regulatory approvals. This meeting is crucial for the bank's financial review and future growth strategies.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 30, 2026.
  • To consider Q4 FY26-27 financial results.
  • Proposal for FY25-26 dividend recommendation.
  • Capital raising plan for FY26-27 to be discussed.
  • Options include FPO, Rights Issue, QIP, AT1/Tier II Bonds.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CENTRAL BANK OF INDIA | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [COMMAND] Command Polymers: Reg 32 not applicable; no funds raised in Q4 FY26
item.description:
Command Polymers Ltd has informed the exchange that Regulation 32 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, is not applicable to the company for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. The company confirmed that it did not raise any funds through public issue, rights issue, preferential issue, or Qualified Institutional Placement (QIP) during this period. Consequently, a statement of deviation or variation in the utilization of funds, as typically required under Regulation 32, is not necessary for Command Polymers.

  • Regulation 32 of SEBI LODR is not applicable to the company.
  • No funds were raised in Q4 FY26 via public or rights issues.
  • Company did not undertake any preferential issue or QIP.
  • No deviation report on fund utilization is required for the quarter.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Command Polymers Ltd | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [BLUEDART] Blue Dart Board Meeting on May 9, 2026 to Consider Results, Dividend
item.description:
Blue Dart Express Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 9, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results (standalone & consolidated) for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider a dividend on equity shares, if any, for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window will remain closed from April 1, 2026, to May 11, 2026.

  • Blue Dart board to meet on May 9, 2026 for FY26 results.
  • Board will consider dividend on equity shares for FY26.
  • Trading window closed from April 1 to May 11, 2026.
  • Meeting will be held at the company's registered office.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BLUE DART EXPRESS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [MCLEODRUSS] McLeod Russel: Board Approves CFO Appointment & 3 MoUs for Asset Sale
item.description:
McLeod Russel India Ltd's Board of Directors approved two key actions on April 27, 2026. Mr. Pradip Bhar was appointed as an Additional Director and Whole-Time Director (CFO) for three years, effective immediately. Additionally, the Board approved the execution of three Memoranda of Understanding (MoUs) for the proposed disposal of assets from Nya Gogra, Rupajuli, and Boroi Tea Estates in Assam. This divestment aims to facilitate part-payment of debt as per the sanction letter from National Asset Reconstruction Company Limited (NARCL) through India Debt Resolution Company Limited.

  • Mr. Pradip Bhar appointed Whole-Time Director and CFO for three years.
  • Board approved three MoUs for proposed disposal of tea estate assets.
  • Assets of Nya Gogra, Rupajuli, and Boroi Tea Estates to be sold.
  • Asset disposal is for part-payment of debt to NARCL/IDRCL.
  • Mr. Bhar has 39 years of experience in the tea industry and leads financial resolution.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MCLEOD RUSSEL INDIA LTD. | Category: Divestment

item.title: [KABRADG] Kabra Drugs Board to meet May 6 for Pharma Expansion & AI Integration
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Kabra Drugs Ltd. has informed BSE that its Board of Directors will convene a meeting on May 6, 2026. The agenda includes significant strategic discussions, specifically focusing on the expansion of pharmaceutical manufacturing and marketing of its own brands through strategic channel partners. Additionally, the Board will evaluate new opportunities in defense manufacturing, leveraging Artificial Intelligence (AI) Technologies. This meeting is in compliance with Regulation 29 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 6, 2026.
  • To discuss pharmaceutical manufacturing and marketing expansion.
  • Company to explore defense manufacturing with AI technologies.
  • Strategic channel partners for brand expansion will be considered.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KABRA DRUGS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [AAVAS] AAVAS Board Meeting on 05/05/2026 to Approve Audited Financial Results
item.description:
AAVAS Financiers Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 5, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider overall limits for raising funds through Non-Convertible Debentures and other debt securities via private placement. The trading window remains closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the results are submitted to stock exchanges.

  • AAVAS board to approve audited financial results on May 5, 2026.
  • Fundraising via NCDs and other debt securities to be considered.
  • Trading window closed until 48 hours post result submission.
  • Meeting is pursuant to Regulation 29 and 50 of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AAVAS Financiers Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [PIRAMALFIN] Piramal Finance: FY26 PAT at ₹1506 Cr, Up 210% YoY
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Piramal Finance Ltd reported a consolidated PAT of ₹1,506 Cr for FY26, a 210% YoY increase, and Q4 FY26 PAT of ₹502 Cr, up 390% YoY. Total AUM crossed ₹1 lakh crore, growing 25% YoY to ₹1,01,230 Cr. The company saw improvements in net income margin and a stable asset quality with GNPA at 2.3% and NNPA at 1.6%. Credit ratings were upgraded by Crisil, ICRA, Care, and S&P Global. The company also received deferred consideration from the sale of Piramal Imaging and completed the sale of Shriram Life Insurance stake.

  • FY26 PAT increased by 210% YoY to ₹1,506 Cr.
  • Total Assets Under Management (AUM) grew 25% YoY to ₹1,01,230 Cr.
  • Growth business RoAUM improved to 2.1% in Q4 FY26.
  • Credit ratings upgraded by Crisil, ICRA, Care, and S&P Global.
  • Retail AUM grew 33% YoY, comprising 85% of total AUM.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Piramal Finance Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SOBHA] Sobha Ltd Board Meeting on May 4, 2026 to Approve Financial Results
item.description:
Sobha Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 4, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider recommending a dividend, if any, on the company's equity shares. The trading window for designated persons has been closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of financial results.

  • Sobha Ltd's board will meet on May 4, 2026, to approve financial results.
  • The board will consider audited standalone and consolidated financial results.
  • A dividend recommendation will be considered at the meeting.
  • The trading window is closed from April 1, 2026, until after the results are declared.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sobha Limited | Category: Board Meeting
